context: Evaluates correct use of all five note Tauri commands: note_create, notes_list, note_get, note_update, and note_delete. Tests the full CRUD lifecycle for notes, including correct notebook_id usage and body handling.

checklist.name: note_create usage
checklist.description: The solution calls `note_create` with `notebook_id` (UUID string) and `title` (string), and returns the full `Note` object including `body` and `body_format` fields.

checklist.name: notes_list usage
checklist.description: The solution calls `notes_list` with a `notebook_id` UUID string and returns `NoteMeta[]` (objects without a body field).

checklist.name: note_get usage
checklist.description: The solution calls `note_get` with a note UUID string and returns the full `Note` object including the decrypted `body` field.

checklist.name: note_update usage
checklist.description: The solution calls `note_update` with a complete `Note` object (including `body` and `body_format` fields) to persist title and body changes.

checklist.name: note_delete usage
checklist.description: The solution calls `note_delete` with a note UUID string to remove the note.
